# Guarded Growth IP

> Building the data infrastructure for global intellectual property. Modern IP management platform built on a proprietary data layer across 100+ IP offices today (with 190+ in the foundation roadmap), AI intelligence and purpose-built product engines (DocketEngine, RenewalEngine) on top.

Guarded Growth IP LLC is a US-based (Austin, TX) IP management technology company building infrastructure-first IP software for mid-size law firms (5–50 attorneys) and corporate in-house IP teams. The company was founded by Valli S Challa (IP operations) and Karan S Kumar (technology) in 2025; both engines went live in 2026.

## Products

- [DocketEngine](https://guardedgrowthip.com/products/docketengine/): Automated IP docketing across 100+ jurisdictions. Real-time sync with USPTO, EUIPO, WIPO, JPO, KIPO, and every major IP office. Trademark docketing today; patent docketing on the near-term roadmap. Pricing starts at $99/month.
- [RenewalEngine](https://guardedgrowthip.com/products/renewalengine/): Patent and trademark renewals across 190+ jurisdictions, delivered in strategic partnership with a market leader in the renewals space. Line-item pricing with no opaque markups; renewals shift from cost passthrough to a margin line for the firm.
- [Platform overview](https://guardedgrowthip.com/platform/): Three-layer architecture — proprietary data infrastructure, AI/intelligence layer, purpose-built engines. The broader platform vision is in progress.

## Solutions by audience

- [For Solo Attorneys](https://guardedgrowthip.com/solutions/solo-attorneys/)
- [For IP Law Firms (5–50 attorneys)](https://guardedgrowthip.com/solutions/ip-law-firms/) — primary ICP
- [For Corporate In-House IP Teams](https://guardedgrowthip.com/solutions/corporate-in-house/)
- [For Universities & TTOs](https://guardedgrowthip.com/solutions/universities-tto/) — patent renewal savings + trademark docketing for university brands and spinouts

## Pricing

- [Full pricing](https://guardedgrowthip.com/pricing/): DocketEngine has three tiers — Start ($99/mo, up to 100 matters), Growth ($399/mo, 100–500 matters, AI insights), and Scale (custom enterprise, unlimited users, SSO/SAML, SOC2-aligned, Risk detection). Monthly and annual billing (annual saves 2 months). All plans include a 14-day free trial. Education pricing on request for universities and non-profit research institutions. RenewalEngine pricing is portfolio-based and quoted custom.

## Company

- [Our Story](https://guardedgrowthip.com/company/)
- [Careers](https://guardedgrowthip.com/company/careers/)

## Key facts

- Headquartered at 5900 Balcones Drive #28582, Austin, TX 78731, USA
- Contact: info@guardedgrowthip.com · +1 (281) 803-6492 · https://www.linkedin.com/company/guardedgrowth/
- 100+ IP offices covered today by DocketEngine (USPTO, EUIPO, WIPO, JPO, KIPO, UKIPO, CIPO, INPI, DPMA, IP Australia, CNIPA, INPI Brazil, and many more)
- 190+ jurisdictions covered for renewals via RenewalEngine and its renewals-space partner
- 20M+ patents and 70M+ trademark records targeted in the data infrastructure layer
- Primary ICP: mid-size IP law firms (5–50 attorneys) and corporate in-house IP teams
- Founded: 2025. DocketEngine GA: 2026. RenewalEngine GA: 2026.
